---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? (Focus on the problem,
not a specific solution.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches Vector behavior, link the relevant
[Vector docs](https://vector.dev/docs/).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Anything else — fleet size, use case, mockups, related issues.
